dapps.name: Liberty Swap
dapps.description: Experience instant, gasless cross-chain transfers to PulseChain. Our intent-based swap engine eliminates the need for native gas tokens, providing a free gas experience for effortless onboarding.

dapps.name: LibertyX
dapps.description: The premier PulseChain DEX aggregator featuring intent-based execution and built-in MEV protection. Enjoy a seamless trading experience with zero fees and optimal price routing across the entire ecosystem.

dapps.name: Drops
dapps.description: Check any crypto wallet address for unclaimed airdrops with Drops.

dapps.name: HERO Base
dapps.description: PulseChain and BASE DEX aggregator built for veterans. Best swap rates across PulseX, 9inch, and Liberty Swap with gasless transactions, DCA orders, limit orders, and portfolio tracking.
